texto: A democracy cannot exist as a permanent form of government. It can only exist until the people discover they can vote themselves largess out of the public treasury. From that moment on, the majority always votes for the canidate promising the most benefits from the public treasury, with the result that democracy always collapses over a loose fiscal policy--to be followed by a dictatorship.
explicacao: Citação de Alexander Fraser Tytler sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “A democracy cannot exist as a permanent form of government. It can only exist until the people di…” articula reflexao, freedom, law em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como law e taxes.

frase_original: A democracy cannot exist as a permanent form of government. It can only exist until the people discover they can vote themselves largess out of the public treasury. From that moment on, the majority always votes for the canidate promising the most benefits from the public treasury, with the result that democracy always collapses over a loose fiscal policy--to be followed by a dictatorship.
